title: HPTU Date Sheet 2026 Out

detail.title: HPTU Date Sheet 2026 Out
detail.short_info: Himachal Pradesh Technical University has released the HPTU Date Sheet 2026 for June end semester examinations. Download the official PDF for B.Tech, BCA, MBA, MCA and other UG/PG courses at himtu.ac.in.

content.text: Himachal Pradesh Technical University (HPTU) has officially released the Final Date Sheet 2026 for end-semester examinations commencing from June 04, 2026. The schedule covers B.Tech and other Undergraduate & Postgraduate programmes under NEP, CBCS and PCI schemes. Students can now download the official HPTU Date Sheet 2026 PDF from the university website and check their respective exam timetable.
Direct Link to Download HPTU Date Sheet 2026 Here

links.text: Direct Link to Download HPTU Date Sheet 2026 Here

rows: B.Tech, B.Arch, BCA, BBA, B.Pharmacy, M.Tech, MCA, MBA, M.Sc and others

content.text: HPTU has released detailed date sheets for multiple semesters and branches of B.Tech along with other UG and PG programmes. The examinations are scheduled in Morning (09:00 AM - 12:00 Noon) and Evening (02:00 PM - 05:00 PM) sessions.

rows: I, II, III, IV, V, VI, VII & VIII Semester

sections.heading: How to Download HPTU Date Sheet 2026

content.text: Students can download the HPTU Date Sheet 2026 from the official university website by following the steps given below:

items: Visit the official website of Himachal Pradesh Technical University.
Navigate to the Examination or Date Sheet section.
Look for the link titled "Final Date Sheet for June 2026 Examinations".
Click on the relevant B.Tech or programme-wise date sheet PDF.
The file will open. Download and save it on your device.
Take a printout for ready reference during exam preparation.

content.text: Note: Always refer to the official HPTU date sheet and check all dates, timings, and instructions carefully before the examinations.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in HPTU Date Sheet 2026

content.text: The official HPTU Date Sheet 2026 contains complete information required by the students. The key details mentioned in the date sheet are:

items: Examination dates and day
Session timing (Morning / Evening)
Subject code and title
Branch-wise / Group-wise schedule
Applicable scheme (NEP / CBCS)
Important instructions for candidates
Official Date Sheet PDF: Click Here
Official Website: Click Here
